name: Bardoc Gold Limited
description: Bardoc Gold Limited is an Australian-based gold exploration and development company. The company's flagship asset is the Bardoc Gold Project, located in the Eastern Goldfields region of Western Australia, approximately 55km north of Kalgoorlie. The project hosts a significant gold resource and is situated in a highly active mining district with excellent infrastructure. Bardoc Gold is focused on exploring and developing its extensive tenement holding to establish a long-term, sustainable gold mining operation.
